task_prompt: Read the -README.md file and run the codes accordingly
tasks: Based on Figure 2 results, what is the average treatment effect (ATT) from the hate crime matrix completion analysis? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.
From the Twitter analysis replication, what is the average treatment effect on anti-Muslim tweets for Liverpool fans after Salah joined? Return only the number rounded to three decimal places.
From the survey experiment replication, what is the treatment effect of the religion condition on the principal component outcome? Return only the number rounded to two decimal places.
From the hate crime placebo analysis using Sadio Mane's arrival, what is the two-sided p-value for the average treatment effect? Return only the number.
From the crime placebo analysis, how many different crime categories were compared against hate crimes? Return only the number.
